pcr: EPD Hub Core PCR v1.2 (2025-03-24); cPCR EN 16757
lca_tool: One Click LCA Concrete EPD Generator v3.2.3
scope: Cradle to gate with options, A4-A5, and modules C1-C4, D
notes: Source defect (p5): the A5 installation-scenario narrative reads 'A production loss of  % at installation is assumed (A5)' — the numeric value was dropped from the template; the Allocation section (p4) separately states 'A5, 3% waste', suggesting the intended figure is 3%. Does not affect any GWP figure captured here.
B1–B7 all ND (use stage not assessed). Module D is the recycling credit (−11.8) and is never summed into an A–C total.
gwp_a1a3_alt (+A1/CML = 208) retained only to drive a 'not comparable' warning against +A2 figures.
Same manufacturer/template family as EPD Hub HUB-5943 (Entire Concrete, Cameron Park + Singleton sites); PCR, program operator, and lca_tool strings are identical across the two EPDs.
